dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Everyone has a side they don't show anyone else.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: To their friends, their significant others, or even their families.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: They hide what they're truly feeling through fake smiles or bravado,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: and keep their true identities secret.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: That is how the world keeps up the appearance of its temporary peace.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: In an era in which the nations of the world were waging a fierce w*r

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: of information just out of sight,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: two countries were at odds with each other.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Ostania, in the east, was secretly plotting to start a w*r.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Westalis, in the west, wanted to put a stop to those plans.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: In order to keep an eye on the actions of a leading figure in Ostania's government,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Westalis set Operation Strix in motion.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The one tasked with this operation is the skilled agent, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The mission given to the master of disguise with a hundred faces was...

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: to start a family.

xml.narration: Park Avenue, West DistrictCapital City of Berlint, Ostania

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is this everything you own?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's not very much.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um, Loid... about the sleeping arrangements...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We'll be sleeping in separate rooms, of course.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We'll share one for appearances anytime we have guests over.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: R-Right.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Welcome to Anya's house!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thank you for the lovely welcome, Miss Anya.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: This house is home to a rather unusual family.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The father, Loid Forger, is a psychiatrist.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: His true identity: a spy.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Code name: Twilight.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The mother, Yor Forger, is a civil servant who works at city hall.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Her true identity: an assassin.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Code name: Thorn Princess.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The daughter, Anya Forger.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Her true identity: a telepath.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm so happy to have a mama now!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Mama...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm gonna help.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, right. By the way...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I had a friend of mine who's a judge make it so we got married a year ago.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: By that, I mean he forged the certificate.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We can figure out why we lived separately and what to tell your brother later.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: All right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It would make the school suspicious if we got married just before the interview.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I got permission from the Shopkeeper, so I feel much better.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: So exciting...

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Father, mother, daughter...

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: These three created this pretend family to further their own ends,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: and are living under the same roof as they hide their true identities from each other.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm going to show Mama around!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Once we get settled in, we'll practice the interview.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is the kitchen!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is good at cooking!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, I see.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is the toilet. And that's the bathtub!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Everything's so clean.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I can wash my face all by myself!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You're such a big girl, Miss Anya.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is Anya's room!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Welcome!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thank you for inviting me in.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: My, what an adorable room.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'll introduce you to Mr. Chimera.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I am Chimera. It is a pweasure to meet your acquiantenance.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's very nice to meet you, Mr. Chimera.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I am Miss Anya's mama.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is Papa's room!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: So this is Loid's room...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is your room, Mama.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Come in, Mama.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Why, thank you.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: So this is my...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What a lovely room.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm glad you like it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This should be everything.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is the furniture arranged to your liking? I also cleaned a bit.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes, everything is wonderful.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I helped clean, too!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Really? Thank you so much.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Am I a good girl?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: All you did was tip over a bucket of water.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Shock!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: This is such a lovely room. I don't know what to do with myself.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What do you mean?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Please make yourself at home.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Actually, this is your home now, so make yourself comfortable.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thank you.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll come get your boxes once they're empty.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid, I've got everything put away.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're quite efficient.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Ah, this must be your younger brother.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, yes.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You said he's also a civil servant?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes. He seems quite busy lately, so I've only spoken to him on the phone.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It seems you two are quite similar.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I should properly introduce myself once Anya's entrance exam is over.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um, Loid. About that...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I don't have anything suitable to wear to this interview...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Then let's go to the tailor today.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thank you very much.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Helping, helping...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: M-Miss Anya, I'll take care of that!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I have my work weapons and poison powerful enough to k*ll an elephant in there.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Can I get you something, Loid?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Some coffee, please. Black.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I want hot cocoa!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: With sugar and milk.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: That's the stuff!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: They look amazing. Are those cookies homemade?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's actually my first time making cookies.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I just followed a recipe from a cookbook, so they should be decent.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I hope you like them.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thank you.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: They're wonderful! You really are an amazing cook!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's not that impressive, really.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I helped with the cookies, too!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, I see.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: After you got covered in flour and got in my way,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: you just snacked on some peanuts.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Once we're settled in, let's begin.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Eden College is one of the most prestigious schools in the country.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: During the interview, not only will the child be evaluated,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but so will the parents.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: They will be evaluated on their social standing as well as how cultured they are.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Understood?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now, let's start the questions.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: First, please state your name and address.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya Fo...Fo...Horger. Address?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The place we're at right now.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is Anya's house!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's not what I meant.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Er, so, Miss Anya... How do you spend your days off?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa orders me to stay home,

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: so I have to watch TV all alone.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now, wait a second.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That makes a terrible impression. Madam?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Why did you choose Eden College, and how do you plan to pass this exam?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: How do people usually pass?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um, pass, passing...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Perhaps because of cardiac arrest, or excessive bleeding?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Or compound fractures throughout the body?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh! Maybe their skull was caved in.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: k*ll me now. Next question.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Could you describe your parenting methods?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? U-Um... Strike first to be victorious?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm amazed her brother turned out to be a decent human being.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've been a spy for over a decade.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've completed countless missions,yet only now do I find myself losing heart.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This is pointless. There's no way we'll survive the interview at this rate.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Let's give up on getting her into that school.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid! Please remember your late wife's wishes!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Clearly, we weren't ready for this mock interview yet.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: All right, let's go out for a bit.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Let's broaden our horizons, become versed in what is normal for an upper-class family,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and make sure that we're all on the same page.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: We're on an ooting, an ooting, la, la, la, lah!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You mean "outing."

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Wanna hold hands, Mama?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-If you don't mind.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank goodness Anya's taken a liking to her.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The plan is set.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: After today, we'll seem like a normal... no.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We'll be seen as an upper-crust family.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh... This reminds me of when my little brother was still small and adorable.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: And that one time I hugged him too hard and ended up breaking two of his ribs.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I must be careful.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Wait... what? Maybe not...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: B-By the way, where are we headed?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've acquired a variety of tickets through my connections at work.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Tradition and status are everything at Eden College.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We'll have to experience and get accustomed to the best that life has to offer,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and make sure we don't slip up if we let our guard down.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: All right, next.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya, no yelling while we're here.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: 'Kay.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We've experienced first-class music,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so now for some first-class art... And you know the rest.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa! I can see her boobies!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Head's been choppy-chopped! Body's been choppy-chopped!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What did I just say about yelling?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Y-Yor...?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I wanna do that!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Drawing? Sure.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor, why don't we sit down for a bit?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: All right.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya's house is a big castle.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The boss of the secret organization is Director Chimera.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is a spy! Pew, pew!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama is an assassin! Stabby, stabby, sploosh!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We should probably get going.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: All done!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya, we're going to our next stop.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: If Papa and Mama see this,they'll find out about my powers!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Wow, that's quite a masterpiece.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There seems to be a pig in a forest.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: That's Mr. Chimera, and he lives in a castle!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I see. I definitely see Bondman there, though.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm right, aren't I?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Yep...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's that spy cartoon you were watching last week.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So this witch-looking one must be the princess.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That part seems rather graphic.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, but that cat is cute.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: That's a doggy!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I see. Then I apologize.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We're going to the tailor next.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Sorry to have you do this on your day off.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's quite all right. This is something we need to do.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: My going-out clothes are so cute!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: They fit perfectly!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This shop is great! I love it!

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Why, thank you.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This is my first ooting in my going-out clothes.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Then it must be a day of celebration.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A day to celebrate this ooting!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: In that case, we can stop by a photography studio next.

dialogue.name: Female Employee
dialogue.speech: Yor, dear. Right this way.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Coming.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: If you're looking for a semi-formal dress, I think this color would do nicely.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: What do you think?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'd honestly prefer a black or red dress.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Really? I think this would look nice on you, Yor.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Then how about this?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Judging from her lack of luggage, I thought she had no interest in clothes.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I see you're particular about matching colors.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: No... I wouldn't say that.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: This color's lovely, but I'm worried that blood splatters would be too noticeable.

dialogue.name: Female employee
dialogue.speech: Looks like Yor finally found someone nice.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Hopefully they last. Having a child already is an instant no for me, though.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Looks like the extra outfits will be ready by the interview, too.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm so sorry to have you get so many.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, you look nice in colors besides red and black.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We'll be going out more often, too.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ootings! Ootings!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're a regular at that shop, aren't you?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm sure we'll continue to shop there, so next time, we should tell them we're married.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, right.

dialogue.name: Politician
dialogue.speech: We, the Nationalist Party, believe that there is a road to peace with the West.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Patriotism is also important within Eden.

dialogue.name: Audience A
dialogue.speech: You moron!

dialogue.name: Audience B
dialogue.speech: k*ll all the b*stards in the West!

dialogue.name: Politician
dialogue.speech: Continuing to treat Westalis as the enemy will do us no good.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll need to make sure she's knowledgeable of politics and history, as well.

dialogue.name: Audience C
dialogue.speech: Piss off, traitor!

dialogue.name: Audience F
dialogue.speech: Gimme money, gimme money, gimme money...

dialogue.name: Audience D
dialogue.speech: Those b*stards k*lled my family!

dialogue.name: Audience E
dialogue.speech: Get lost with the pleasantries!

dialogue.name: Audience G
dialogue.speech: First I lost my job, then my home!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What's the matter?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I don't like places like this...

dialogue.name: Audience H
dialogue.speech: k*ll all the shitheads in the West!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Sorry. Maybe this was a little scary for you.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Let's go rest somewhere.

dialogue.name: Audience I
dialogue.speech: The East did nothing wrong!

dialogue.name: Audience mob
dialogue.speech: Go back to your Western masters!

dialogue.name: Audience mob
dialogue.speech: Damn it!

dialogue.name: Audience mob
dialogue.speech: You pig!

dialogue.name: Audience mob
dialogue.speech: You stupid baldy!

dialogue.name: Audience mob
dialogue.speech: Your feet smell, too!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa, I'm hungry.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Are you all right or not?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, Anya. Don't just pick the nuts off the and no eating with your hands.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And Yor, uh... Hmm...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've been a spy for over a decade.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've completed countless missions,yet once again I find myself losing heart.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: S'all good, Papa.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What is?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yeah, I definitely picked the wrong child.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, this is all because I was expected to rely on others.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I shouldn't have put the key to success in the hands of others, let alone civilians.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Predicting every possible situation, preparing for it,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and acting from a carefully laid-out plan.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Those are the ironclad rules of being a spy.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Which means that I need to list every possible question the interviewer can ask,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: then have these two memorize the perfect answers to go with them.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If all else fails, make sure I can back them up—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Why don't we go get some fresh air?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The people look like bits of trash from up here.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Where did you get that from?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: My cartoons.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Ah...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I had no idea there was a park like this on the outskirts of town.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I don't come here that often either,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: but I wander over here when I'm exhausted from work.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thinking about how the work I do helps everyone in this city out

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: encourages me to work harder.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, this place must be awfully boring! I'm terribly sorry!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I like this place better than crowded places!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, that's wonderful!

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Thief! Someone help!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That old lady should've been more careful.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You won't get away with this!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Hold it right there!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, damn it.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I lost track of him.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Are you all right, ma'am? Are you hurt?

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: I'm fine. Just a few scratches.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I promise I'll catch him for you! And I'll take you to the hospital later!

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Why, thank you.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I left Loid and Anya behind.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He blended in with the crowd.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm very sorry, Yor, but you probably won't be able to find him now.

dialogue.name: Mob A
dialogue.speech: Man, I'm starving.

dialogue.name: Mob B
dialogue.speech: So expensive...

dialogue.name: Mob C
dialogue.speech: Aw, this is so cute.

dialogue.name: Mob D
dialogue.speech: Crap, I'm gonna piss my pants.

dialogue.name: Mob E
dialogue.speech: My feet hurt.

dialogue.name: Mob G
dialogue.speech: That shopworker is so cool.

dialogue.name: Mob F
dialogue.speech: I wonder if there's a million dalc lying around somewhere.

dialogue.name: Mob M
dialogue.speech: Oh, I forgot to pay my rent.

dialogue.name: Mob H
dialogue.speech: Man, he's late.

dialogue.name: Mob I
dialogue.speech: Honestly, this child...

dialogue.name: Mob J
dialogue.speech: What am I going to do? I failed my test again.

dialogue.name: Mob K
dialogue.speech: That b*stard. I'm gonna m*rder him.

dialogue.name: Mob L
dialogue.speech: Maybe I'll say hi...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey, this again?

dialogue.name: Thief
dialogue.speech: Man, that old crone was loaded.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Whoa, what?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I wanna eat cake!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We just left the restaurant...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He's...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He changed his clothes, but it's not so easy to change the way you walk.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Don't think you'll get away from me.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama's here.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor, look after Anya for me.

dialogue.name: Thief
dialogue.speech: I'll be able to have plenty of fun for a while with this much.

dialogue.name: Thief
dialogue.speech: First, I'm gonna treat myself to the finest meal and—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A filthy swine like you deserves nothing more than the foulest meal.

dialogue.name: Mob N
dialogue.speech: What's going on?

dialogue.name: Mob O
dialogue.speech: A guy just dropped from the sky.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A spy must not bring attention to himself.

dialogue.name: Mob P
dialogue.speech: Did he fall?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Pardon me. This fellow is a purse snatcher, so please call the police and hand him over.

dialogue.name: Mob P
dialogue.speech: A purse snatcher?

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Thank you for escorting me all the way here.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: I had money to get my grandchild a gift in my purse.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Thank you so much. You were a big help.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, actually...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: The one who got it back was my, um, husband.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, if you weren't there, Yor, I wouldn't have even gone after him.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Thank you so much. What a fine gentleman you are.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Er, again...

dialogue.name: flashback Chief
dialogue.speech: Hero who casts no shadow,

dialogue.name: flashback Chief
dialogue.speech: the great deeds you and your fellow agents do shall never see the light of day.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Thank you.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I guess... receiving thanks every once in a while wouldn't hurt.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is a softie.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you, Yor.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Today was a nice change of pace.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now I'll be able to work hard again.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa and Mama are flirting.

dialogue.name: Loid and Yor
dialogue.speech: We are not!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Does Anya get a thank you, too?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well... I guess we did find the thief because you were hungry again.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Good girl.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: My, what a lovely family you are.

dialogue.name: Old woman
dialogue.speech: Here's some candy for you, dear.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Candy!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Make sure you say, "Thank you."

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The ooting is over!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What a long day.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I want some hot cocoa, please!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: As you wish.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey, more importantly, we need to retry this mock interview.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So, Miss Anya, how do you spend your days off?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: We go to the opera, the museum, and eat at restaurants.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes! Exactly!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If you're asked this question, make sure you talk about today.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Okay, next question.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You've seen your friend do something naughty.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What will you do?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'd jump on top of them, beat them up, and make them eat the foulest meal!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hmm... Pretend you never saw that, okay?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yup, this is hopeless. I'm done.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa, you were so cool!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes, he was.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ka-bam!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: It's the foulest meal for you!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Hot cocoa is the best.

dialogue.name: flashback Old woman
dialogue.speech: My, what a lovely family you are.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I guess if she saw us that way...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: About one percent of my preparations are complete.
